memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tisci_version_info *ver)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_revision

briefdescription.para: Get the revision information of the TI SCI firmware.

detaileddescription.para: Queries the TI SCI firmware for its version and revision information. The retrieved information is stored in the provided ver structure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to a structure where the firmware version information will be stored

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or a negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, uint8_t *programmed_state, uint8_t *current_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_clock_state

briefdescription.para: Get the state of a clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Pointer to store the requested state of the clock
Pointer to store the current state of the clock

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, uint32_t flags, uint8_t state)
memberdef.name: tisci_set_clock_state

briefdescription.para: Set the state of a clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Header flags as needed
State to request for the clock

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, bool *req_state, bool *curr_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_is_on

briefdescription.para: Check if the clock is ON.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Pointer to store whether the clock is managed and enabled
Pointer to store whether the clock is ready for operation

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, bool *req_state, bool *curr_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_is_off

briefdescription.para: Check if the clock is OFF.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Pointer to store whether the clock is managed and disabled
Pointer to store whether the clock is NOT ready for operation

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, bool *req_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_is_auto

briefdescription.para: Check if the clock is being auto-managed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Pointer to store whether the clock is auto-managed

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, uint64_t *freq)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_get_freq

briefdescription.para: Get the current frequency of a clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Pointer to store the current frequency in Hz

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, uint64_t min_freq, uint64_t target_freq, uint64_t max_freq)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_set_freq

briefdescription.para: Set a frequency for a clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Minimum allowable frequency in Hz
Target clock frequency in Hz
Maximum allowable frequency in Hz

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, uint64_t min_freq, uint64_t target_freq, uint64_t max_freq, uint64_t *match_freq)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_get_match_freq

briefdescription.para: Get a matching frequency for a clock.

detaileddescription.para: Finds a frequency that matches the requested range for a clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Minimum allowable frequency in Hz
Target clock frequency in Hz
Maximum allowable frequency in Hz
Pointer to store the matched frequency in Hz

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, uint8_t parent_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_set_parent

briefdescription.para: Set the parent clock for a clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Identifier of the parent clock to set

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, uint8_t *parent_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_get_parent

briefdescription.para: Get the parent clock for a clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Pointer to store the identifier of the parent clock

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, uint8_t *num_parents)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_clk_get_num_parents

briefdescription.para: Get the number of parent clocks for a clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
Pointer to store the number of parent clocks

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id, bool needs_ssc, bool can_change_freq, bool enable_input_term)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_clock

briefdescription.para: Get control of a clock from TI SCI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request
'true' if Spread Spectrum clock is desired, else 'false'
'true' if frequency change is desired, else 'false'
'true' if input termination is desired, else 'false'

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_idle_clock

briefdescription.para: Idle a clock that is under control of TI SCI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t clk_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_put_clock

briefdescription.para: Release a clock from control back to TI SCI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Clock identifier for the device for this request

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint32_t flags, uint8_t state)
memberdef.name: tisci_set_device_state

briefdescription.para: Set the state of a device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Flags to set for the device

State to move the device to:
0: Device is off
1: Device is on
2: Device is in retention
3: Device is in reset

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint32_t flags, uint8_t state)
memberdef.name: tisci_set_device_state_no_wait

briefdescription.para: Set the state of a device without waiting for a response.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Flags to set for the device

State to move the device to:
0: Device is off
1: Device is on
2: Device is in retention
3: Device is in reset

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint32_t *clcnt, uint32_t *resets, uint8_t *p_state, uint8_t *c_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_get_device_state

briefdescription.para: Get the state of a device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Pointer to store the Context Loss Count
Pointer to store the reset count
Pointer to store the programmed state
Pointer to store the current state

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_device

briefdescription.para: Request exclusive access to a device managed by TISCI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_device_exclusive

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_idle_device

briefdescription.para: Command to idle a device managed by TISCI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_idle_device_exclusive

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_put_device

briefdescription.para: Command to release a device managed by TISCI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_dev_is_valid

briefdescription.para: Check if a device ID is valid.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request

simplesect.para: 0 if the device ID is valid, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint32_t *count)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_dev_get_clcnt

briefdescription.para: Get the context loss counter for a device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Pointer to store the context loss counter

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, bool *r_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_dev_is_idle

briefdescription.para: Check if the device is requested to be idle.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Pointer to store the result (true if requested to be idle)

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, bool *r_state, bool *curr_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_dev_is_stop

briefdescription.para: Check if the device is requested to be stopped.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Pointer to store the result (true if requested to be stopped)
Pointer to store the result (true if currently stopped)

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, bool *r_state, bool *curr_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_dev_is_on

briefdescription.para: Check if the device is requested to be ON.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Pointer to store the result (true if requested to be ON)
Pointer to store the result (true if currently ON and active)

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, bool *curr_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_dev_is_trans

briefdescription.para: Check if the device is currently transitioning.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Pointer to store the result (true if currently transitioning)

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint32_t reset_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_set_device_resets

briefdescription.para: Set resets for a device managed by TISCI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Device-specific reset bit field

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint32_t *reset_state)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_device_resets

briefdescription.para: Get reset state for a device managed by TISCI.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Device identifier for this request
Pointer to store the reset state

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t subtype, uint8_t s_host, uint16_t *range_start, uint16_t *range_num)
memberdef.name: tisci_get_resource_range

briefdescription.para: Get a range of resources assigned to a host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
TISCI device ID
Resource assignment subtype being requested
Host processor ID to which the resources are allocated
Pointer to store the start index of the resource range
Pointer to store the number of resources in the range

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t subtype, uint16_t *range_start, uint16_t *range_num)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_resource_range

briefdescription.para: Get a range of resources assigned to the host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
TISCI device ID
Resource assignment subtype being requested
Pointer to store the start index of the resource range
Pointer to store the number of resources in the range

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t dev_id, uint8_t subtype, uint8_t s_host, uint16_t *range_start, uint16_t *range_num)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_resource_range_from_shost

briefdescription.para: Get a range of resources assigned to a specified host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
TISCI device ID
Resource assignment subtype being requested
Host processor ID to which the resources are allocated
Pointer to store the start index of the resource range
Pointer to store the number of resources in the range

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t proc_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_proc_request

briefdescription.para: Command to request a physical processor control.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Processor ID this request is for

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t proc_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_proc_release

briefdescription.para: Command to release a physical processor control.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Processor ID this request is for

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t proc_id, uint8_t host_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_proc_handover

briefdescription.para: Command to handover a physical processor control to a host in the processor's access control list.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Processor ID this request is for
Host ID to get the control of the processor

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t proc_id, uint64_t bootvector, uint32_t config_flags_set, uint32_t config_flags_clear)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_set_proc_boot_cfg

briefdescription.para: Command to set the processor boot configuration flags.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Processor ID this request is for
Boot vector address
Configuration flags to be set
Configuration flags to be cleared

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t proc_id, uint32_t control_flags_set, uint32_t control_flags_clear)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_set_proc_boot_ctrl

briefdescription.para: Command to set the processor boot control flags.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Processor ID this request is for
Control flags to be set
Control flags to be cleared

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint64_t *image_addr, uint32_t *image_size)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_proc_auth_boot_image

briefdescription.para: Command to authenticate and load the image, then set the processor configuration flags.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to the memory address of the payload image and certificate
Pointer to the size of the image after authentication

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t proc_id, uint64_t *bv, uint32_t *cfg_flags, uint32_t *ctrl_flags, uint32_t *sts_flags)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_proc_boot_status

briefdescription.para: Command to get the processor boot status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Processor ID this request is for
Pointer to store the boot vector
Pointer to store the configuration flags
Pointer to store the control flags
Pointer to store the status flags

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t proc_id, uint8_t num_wait_iterations, uint8_t num_match_iterations, uint8_t delay_per_iteration_us, uint8_t delay_before_iterations_us, uint32_t status_flags_1_set_all_wait, uint32_t status_flags_1_set_any_wait, uint32_t status_flags_1_clr_all_wait, uint32_t status_flags_1_clr_any_wait)
memberdef.name: tisci_proc_wait_boot_status_no_wait

briefdescription.para: Helper function to wait for a processor boot status without requesting or waiting for a response.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Processor ID this request is for
Total number of iterations to check before timeout
Number of consecutive matches required to confirm status
Delay in microseconds between each status check
Delay in microseconds before the first status check
Flags that must all be set to 1
Flags where at least one must be set to 1
Flags that must all be cleared to 0
Flags where at least one must be cleared to 0

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t proc_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_proc_shutdown_no_wait

briefdescription.para: Command to shutdown a core without requesting or waiting for a response.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Processor ID this request is for

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t msg_type, uint64_t addr, uint32_t size)
memberdef.name: cmd_set_board_config_using_msg

briefdescription.para: Set board configuration using a specified message type.

detaileddescription.para: Sends a board configuration message to the TI SCI firmware with configuration data from a specified memory location.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
TISCI message type for board configuration
Physical address of board configuration data
Size of board configuration data in bytes

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t valid_params, uint16_t nav_id, uint16_t index, uint32_t addr_lo, uint32_t addr_hi, uint32_t count, uint8_t mode, uint8_t size, uint8_t order_id)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_ring_config

briefdescription.para: Configure a RA ring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Bitfield defining validity of ring configuration parameters
Device ID of Navigator Subsystem from which the ring is allocated
Ring index
The ring base address low 32 bits
The ring base address high 32 bits
Number of ring elements
The mode of the ring
The ring element size
Specifies the ring's bus order ID

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_sys_reset

briefdescription.para: Request a system reset.

detaileddescription.para: Commands the TI SCI firmware to perform a system reset.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint64_t *msmc_start, uint64_t *msmc_end)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_query_msmc

briefdescription.para: Query the available MSMC memory range.

detaileddescription.para: Queries the TI SCI firmware for the currently available MSMC (Multi-Standard Shared Memory Controller) memory range.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to store the MSMC start address
Pointer to store the MSMC end address

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const struct tisci_msg_fwl_region *region)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_set_fwl_region

briefdescription.para: Configure a firewall region.

detaileddescription.para: Sets up a firewall region with the specified configuration parameters including permissions, addresses, and control settings.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to the firewall region configuration parameters

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tisci_msg_fwl_region *region)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_get_fwl_region

briefdescription.para: Get firewall region configuration.

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves the configuration of a firewall region including permissions, addresses, and control settings.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to store the firewall region configuration. The fwl_id, region, and n_permission_regs fields must be set before calling this function.

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tisci_msg_fwl_owner *owner)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_change_fwl_owner

briefdescription.para: Change firewall region owner.

detaileddescription.para: Changes the ownership of a firewall region and retrieves updated ownership information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to firewall owner configuration. On input: contains fwl_id, region, and owner_index On output: contains updated ownership information

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const struct tisci_msg_rm_udmap_tx_ch_cfg *params)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_rm_udmap_tx_ch_cfg

briefdescription.para: Configure a UDMAP transmit channel.

detaileddescription.para: Configures the non-real-time registers of a Navigator Subsystem UDMAP transmit channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to the transmit channel configuration parameters

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const struct tisci_msg_rm_udmap_rx_ch_cfg *params)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_rm_udmap_rx_ch_cfg

briefdescription.para: Configure a UDMAP receive channel.

detaileddescription.para: Configures the non-real-time registers of a Navigator Subsystem UDMAP receive channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to the receive channel configuration parameters

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t nav_id, uint32_t src_thread, uint32_t dst_thread)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_rm_psil_pair

briefdescription.para: Pair PSI-L source thread to destination thread.

detaileddescription.para: Pairs a PSI-L source thread to a destination thread in the Navigator Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Navigator Subsystem device ID
Source thread ID
Destination thread ID

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t nav_id, uint32_t src_thread, uint32_t dst_thread)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_rm_psil_unpair

briefdescription.para: Unpair PSI-L source thread from destination thread.

detaileddescription.para: Unpairs a PSI-L source thread from a destination thread in the Navigator Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Navigator Subsystem device ID
Source thread ID
Destination thread ID

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tisci_irq_set_req *req)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_rm_irq_set

briefdescription.para: Set a Navigator Subsystem IRQ.

detaileddescription.para: Sets up an interrupt route in the Navigator Subsystem using the provided request structure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to the IRQ set request structure

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tisci_irq_release_req *req)
memberdef.name: tisci_cmd_rm_irq_release

briefdescription.para: Release a Navigator Subsystem IRQ.

detaileddescription.para: Releases an interrupt route in the Navigator Subsystem using the provided request structure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the TI SCI device
Pointer to the IRQ release request structure

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, or an error code

briefdescription.para: Public APIs for the TISCI driver.
